61111.name: General Rate Income
61111.description: Income received from the General Rate amount raised quarterly on all properties with valuations located within Logan City.

61211.name: Occupied - Water Rates
61211.description: Income received from water service/access charges raised quarterly on all properties connected to or with the ability to connect to Council's water supply.

61221.name: Gross Usage Rates Water
61221.description: Income received from water consumption on metered properties, charged on quarterly rates notice.

61222.name: Concealed Leak Remissions
61222.description: Concealed Leak RemissionRemission provided by Council in circumstances where the usage of water was not the responsibility of the ratepayer e.g. burst water pipe

61311.name: Connected
61311.description: Income received from Wastewater service/access charges raised quarterly on all properties connected to or with the ability to connect to Council's sewer.

61411.name: Environmental Charge
61411.description: Income received from an environmental levy raised quarterly on all properties with valuations located within Logan City.

61412.name: Community Infrastructure Charge
61412.description: Income received from a community infrastructure charge raised quarterly on all properties with valuations located within Logan City.

61421.name: Garbage Charges
61421.description: Income received from a garbage service charge raised quarterly on all properties with a garbage pick up service located within Logan City.

61422.name: Waste Levy Revenue
61422.description: Revenue relating to the State Government's Waste Levy Revenue received from waste/garbage charges relating only to the Qld State Govt. commercial waste levy.

61431.name: Trade Waste Base Charge
61431.description: Revenue received from annual trade waste utility fee, which includes inspection and testing, meter reading and tracking of trade waste (trade waste fees charged annually in August for financial year fee).

61432.name: Trade Waste Conveyance & Treatment Charge
61432.description: Revenue received from the conveyance and treatment of trade waste, based on trade waste meter readings (trade waste fees charged annually in August for the previous 12 months' readings).

61911.name: Discounts Given
61911.description: Reduction in income - 5% discount on all rates and charges (except Fire Levy) if paid on or before the due date.

61912.name: Pensioner Remissions
61912.description: Remission provided by Council to eligible pensioners on general rate income and other rateable amounts as per revenue statement.

61913.name: State Pensioner Subsidies
61913.description: Subsidy provided by State Government to eligible pensioners on all rates and charges.

62111.name: Application Fees
62111.description: Revenue from Council applications for information or services.

62113.name: Permit, Licence & Registration Fees
62113.description: Revenue from Council licences and registrations and permits to allow certain activities within Council areas.

62114.name: Transaction Fees
62114.description: Revenue received from the fee charged for payments made to Council via Australia Post.

62115.name: Search Fees
62115.description: Revenue from fees associated with performing searches of Council databases and providing this information.

62116.name: Service Fees
62116.description: Revenue received from the fee charged for payments made to Council via Credit Cards.

62117.name: Transfer Fees
62117.description: Revenue from the fees charged to transfer licences, such as food licences.

62119.name: Animal Registration Fees
62119.description: Revenue collected from the registration of animals (cats and dogs) within the city.

62121.name: Charges Received
62121.description: Revenue from fees charged by Council, such as the waste disposal charges at Council's landfill and liquid waste disposal charges at Council's treatment plant.

62125.name: Cemetery Charges
62125.description: Income received for prepaid deposits, instalment plan payments & prepayments for cemetery plots.

62211.name: Admission fees
62211.description: Revenue from admission to Council facilities, such as the Cornubia Sports Centre.

62212.name: Internet Fees
62212.description: Revenue from internet fees expense reimbursement.

62213.name: Miscellaneous Receipts and Photocopies
62213.description: Revenue received from fees for the replacement of library items borrowed and lost.
